scripts.build:all: npm run build -w @piano-llm-lab/shared-types && npm run build -w @piano-llm-lab/api && npm run build -w @piano-llm-lab/web
scripts.test:all: npm run test -w @piano-llm-lab/shared-types && npm run test -w @piano-llm-lab/api && npm run test -w @piano-llm-lab/web
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint -w @piano-llm-lab/api && npm run lint -w @piano-llm-lab/web
